blocks.text: Hushkey is an end-to-end encrypted password manager with native iOS, a Chrome extension, and a sync server. The threat model assumes the server is compromised — secrets never leave a device unencrypted.

items: The sync protocol: per-vault keys derived client-side, server stores only opaque ciphertext
iOS app — vault UI, autofill extension, biometrics-gated unlock
Chrome extension — autofill, vault preview, secure cross-origin messaging
Sync server in Deno on top of Howl, deployed on Cloudflare with Postgres

blocks.text: Hushkey shipped to the App Store and Chrome Web Store with a fully zero-knowledge sync protocol. The Howl framework was extracted from this codebase.
